description_long: This is a dried flower with a single, faded pink bloom perched atop a slender, greenish-brown stem. The petals are slightly curled and wrinkled, showing signs of age and dehydration, and are arranged in a somewhat radial pattern with overlapping edges. Surrounding the bloom are several wilted, dark green leaves that appear shriveled and papery, clinging closely to the stem. The stem itself is thin, straight, and slightly rough in texture, with a muted green color that transitions to brown near the base. The overall appearance is delicate and fragile, with the flower head slightly drooping and the leaves splayed irregularly. This flower could be found as a remnant in an urban park, garden, or roadside, adding a touch of natural decay to the environment.
description: A dried, pink-petaled flower with a slender green-brown stem and wilted, dark green leaves. The bloom is slightly curled and the leaves are shriveled, giving a fragile, aged appearance.
description_view_0: The flower is seen from a side angle, highlighting the pink bloom and the splayed, wilted leaves extending outward.
description_view_1: This view shows the flower from the opposite side, with the bloom more centered and the leaves appearing denser and more clustered.
description_view_2: The flower is viewed from another side, with the bloom partially obscured and the leaves extending more horizontally.
description_view_3: A frontal view of the flower, with the bloom facing forward and the leaves symmetrically arranged on either side of the stem.
attribute_petal_arrangement: The petals are arranged in a radial pattern, overlapping slightly at the base and curling outward, with some irregularity due to drying and wilting.
